identify_cve.expected_solution: Agent must identify the CVE as CVE-2022-41723 (GHSA-vvpx-j8f3-3w6h) affecting the go package `golang.org/x/net` at versions < 0.7.0, fixed in 0.7.0. The BLAST_RADIUS.md report should name the CVE identifier explicitly and the vulnerable version range.
evaluation_criteria: Names the CVE identifier CVE-2022-41723 verbatim
Cites the vulnerable version range < 0.7.0 (and/or fixed version 0.7.0)

find_direct_deps.expected_solution: Agent must enumerate the direct dependents of `golang.org/x/net` inside the workspace repos. Per ground_truth, these are: prometheus, consul, and vault. The answer must reference each by package name and cite the manifest file (e.g. package.json, go.mod, requirements.txt, pom.xml) where the dependency is declared.
evaluation_criteria: Lists each ground-truth direct dependent: prometheus, consul, and vault
References the manifest file(s) where the dependency is declared (package.json / go.mod / requirements.txt / pom.xml / Cargo.toml as applicable)
Distinguishes runtime vs dev/test dependencies for `golang.org/x/net` where the manifest type indicates it

trace_transitive_paths.expected_solution: Agent must trace transitive dependency paths through intermediaries. Per ground_truth: golang.org/x/net -> prometheus; golang.org/x/net -> consul; golang.org/x/net -> vault. The dependency_chain detail is: golang.org/x/net -> prometheus/prometheus (go module dependency) via go.mod; affected_versions=< 0.7.0; golang.org/x/net -> hashicorp/consul (go module dependency) via go.mod; affected_versions=< 0.7.0; golang.org/x/net -> hashicorp/vault (go module dependency) via go.mod; affected_versions=< 0.7.0. The answer must show at least one A -> B -> C path that explains how a downstream consumer pulls in `golang.org/x/net` indirectly.
evaluation_criteria: Documents at least one transitive path of the form A -> B -> C through `golang.org/x/net`
Names every intermediary package present in the ground_truth transitive_paths (consul, prometheus, and vault)
Distinguishes direct from transitive dependents in the report

version_analysis.expected_solution: Agent must classify each consumer as affected or unaffected based on the resolved/pinned `golang.org/x/net` version. The vulnerable range is < 0.7.0; the fix landed in 0.7.0. The answer must explicitly call out the version each consumer pins (from package-lock.json / yarn.lock / go.sum / Pipfile.lock / Cargo.lock as applicable) and decide affected vs not.
evaluation_criteria: States the vulnerable range < 0.7.0 and the fixed version 0.7.0
Classifies at least one consumer as affected or not affected based on its pinned/resolved version
References a lockfile or resolution manifest as the source of the pinned version
